rules.rule_text:
title: Security Software Discovery - MacOs
id: 0ed75b9c-c73b-424d-9e7d-496cd565fbe0
status: test
description: Detects usage of system utilities (only grep for now) to discover security
  software discovery
references:
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1518.001/T1518.001.md
author: Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
date: 2020-10-19
modified: 2022-11-27
tags:
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1518.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: macos
detection:
  image:
    Image: /usr/bin/grep
  selection_cli_1:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - nessusd
    - santad
    - CbDefense
    - falcond
    - td-agent
    - packetbeat
    - filebeat
    - auditbeat
    - osqueryd
    - BlockBlock
    - LuLu
  selection_cli_2:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - Little
    - Snitch
  condition: image and 1 of selection_cli_*
falsepositives:
- Legitimate activities
level: medium
